chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI First Appeal No. 74 of 2017 Illahi Bukhsh Advocate Versus Ahmed Nawaz Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing Case For hearing of Main Case Dated 15.01.2024 None present.-.-.-.-.-. A summary suit of the Appellant was dismissed on the count that the Plaintiff was unable to establish a case in this regard. It was a cheque bounced on 29.12.2008 and the Appellant kept waiting for about three years when the suit was filed on 10.11.2011. The law prescribed a limitation of one year to initiate proceedings under summary chapter. Be that as it may, the Appellant is not appearing in this matter for a quite some time and this appeal is pending since 2017. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HIGH COURT APPEAL No. 94 OF 2015 __________________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For Orders on CMA No. 760/2015 2. For hearing of Main Case ----------------------------------------------- 03.11.2015 Mr. Kashan Ahmed Memon Advocate for the Appellant Mr. Ghulam Mohiuddin Advocate for the Respondent No.1.-.-.-.-.-. After arguing the matter at length this appeal is disposed through following order:- 1. Learned trial Court would frame the issues within 15 days hereof. The office would fix the suit before the learned J-1 on Tuesday (10.11.2015) when both the learned counsel would effect appearance with proposed issues. 2. After framing of issues a Commissioner would be appointed to record evidence with the mandate to complete the evidence within three months and to place it before the Court for Final Arguments.

The office would fix the suit before the learned J-1 on Tuesday (10.11.2015) when both the learned counsel would effect appearance with proposed issues. 2. JUDGE JUDGE AMJAD/PA
